scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && rm -f convex/*.js src/**/*.js tests/**/*.js
scripts.build:prod: bash -c 'cp .env.local .env.local.bak 2>/dev/null; rm -f .env.local; npm run build; mv .env.local.bak .env.local 2>/dev/null; echo "Built with prod DB (stoic-bee-994)"'
scripts.zip: npm run build:prod && cd dist && zip -r ../polovni-komentari-$(node -p "require(\"../manifest.json\").version").zip . && cd .. && echo "Packaged polovni-komentari-$(node -p "require(\"./manifest.json\").version").zip"
